vocab.word: buy a pig in a poke
vocab.meaning: mua một món đồ mà không xem xét kỹ (mua lầm, mua hớ)
vocab.example: I was hesitant at first because buying footwear from an unknown website feels like buying a pig in a poke.

vocab.word: at the drop of a hat
vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức, không ngần ngại
vocab.example: With one-click ordering, I can purchase a new pair of trainers at the drop of a hat, which is dangerous for my bank account.
During the flash sale, there was only a small window of opportunity to grab those limited-edition boots before they sold out.

vocab.word: burn a hole in one's pocket
vocab.meaning: tiền bốc hơi nhanh (khao khát muốn tiêu tiền ngay)
vocab.example: The year-end discount was so tempting that the money in my e-wallet was practically burning a hole in my pocket.

vocab.meaning: xem xét/quan sát cực kỳ cẩn thận (để săn sale hoặc tránh lừa đảo)
vocab.example: I always keep my eyes peeled for any signs of counterfeit products when browsing through third-party resellers.

vocab.meaning: làm việc gì đó sơ sài (để tiết kiệm tiền hoặc thời gian)
vocab.example: Some online vendors cut corners on packaging, so my shoe box arrived completely crushed, though the shoes were fine.

vocab.word: be at the end of one's tether
vocab.ipa: /biː æt ðə end əv wʌnz ˈteðər/
vocab.meaning: kiệt sức/hết kiên nhẫn (khi giải quyết vấn đề đổi trả)
vocab.example: I was at the end of my tether after waiting three weeks for a refund on a pair of heels that didn't fit.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong nháy mắt (tốc độ giao hàng)
vocab.example: I ordered the loafers on Friday, and they arrived in the blink of an eye on Saturday morning.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực vượt bậc (nói về dịch vụ khách hàng)
vocab.example: The online retailer really went the extra mile by including a complimentary cleaning kit with my leather boots.

vocab.meaning: đồng quan điểm (về phong cách hoặc chất lượng)
vocab.example: The seller and I didn't see eye to eye on what constituted a 'minor defect', leading to a long email dispute.
